tracks.title: Stand Up Arkansas Civic Foundations
tracks.subtitle: The launchpad for civic literacy, historical context, and Arkansas power analysis.
tracks.audience: New learners, students, volunteers, and community members entering the platform.

tracks.title: Campaign Manager Path
tracks.subtitle: A systems-level leadership pathway for designing, staffing, and executing campaigns.
tracks.audience: Campaign managers, field directors, chiefs of staff, organizers moving into leadership.

tracks.title: Organizer and Field Path
tracks.subtitle: A pathway for local leaders building people power, volunteer discipline, and public action.
tracks.audience: Community organizers, volunteer leaders, church organizers, union leaders, field captains.

tracks.title: Arkansas Constitution and Ballot Path
tracks.subtitle: A specialized track for deep study of constitutional structure, ballot power, and democratic design.
tracks.audience: Researchers, lawyers, policy advocates, ballot leaders, constitution scholars.

tracks.title: Messaging and Narrative Path
tracks.subtitle: A pathway for people shaping public meaning, movement identity, and Arkansas-facing persuasion.
tracks.audience: Communications leads, spokespeople, media strategists, educators, storytellers.

tracks.title: Leadership Development Path
tracks.subtitle: A pathway for servant leaders building long-term civic infrastructure in Arkansas.
tracks.audience: Executive leaders, movement builders, organizational directors, coalition conveners.

tracks.title: Arkansas History Scholar Path
tracks.subtitle: A pathway for learners who want deep historical context behind Arkansas civic life and public struggle.
tracks.audience: Students, teachers, researchers, historians, public education leaders.
